text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Fan Fest is fast approaching, and
Nishino Flower seems excited for a chance to
interact with all her adoring fans.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if we moved our midday meeting
and had it before training instead?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I want to spend that extra time
making origami.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to make origami flowers to give to all the
visitors who come to the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Since they'll last longer than real ones, I thought
they'd be a great memento.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's not every day I get a chance to thank my fans
directly, after all.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Do you think they'll like my flowers?
choice_data_list: I'm sure everyone will love them!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you so much!
choice_data_list: Can I help in some way?
Can I help in some way?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? But you're busy enough as it is, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I like working with my hands.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You do?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Then I'd love the help! Let's fold some pretty
flowers together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think she realizes the two of us probably
won't be able to make enough on our own, but
telling her that would only break her heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I use every spare moment between
training sessions to fold origami flowers in the
lead-up to the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(The weather's really nice today, so I think I'll
work outside...)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Flower! Yer bloomin' bright as ever, I
see! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Doin' a bit of sunbathin', are ya? Lemme join ya!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, actually...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gee, that sounds real excitin'! Lemme pitch in!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Everything's more fun when ya round up some
pals! That's what I always say! ♪ Now, teach me
how to fold 'em!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I was able to make a really big flower with Taiki's
help... That was so much fun! ♪)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Flower, something has fallen from your pocket. Is
this... an origami flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you for letting me know! I was just—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I see. You are the very definition of
selflessness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Selflessness?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My current research has hit a bit of a wall, as it
were, and I was just in need of a change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be holding on to this paper flower of yours as
a sample. Stop by my laboratory tomorrow. I
should find a way to goad Cafe into taking part,
too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, okay...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(What a surprise! I wasn't expecting the lab to be
filled with so many colorful flowers when I went to
visit.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(It was such an incredible sight. There were even
strangely shaped ones that I've never seen
before. I can't believe Tachyon decided to help
me out... Everyone is so kind.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm? What was that sound?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look at them all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Spring Fan Fest has arrived. I've
made a decent number of flowers, which I bring
along with me to our meeting place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: They're all full of origami flowers!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to some help from Taiki and Tachyon, we
managed to make a really huge number! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Plus, a mysterious helper was nice enough to fold
a whole bunch more and line them up around the
garden.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was shocked by how realistic they look! I'll need
to show my appreciation someday...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Trainer, what do you have in that big
bag?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Look at how many you made!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that there are so many kind people
around who are willing to help makes me truly
happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Let's go pass these out to the
fans!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your support!

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow! What cute origami! Thanks, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I hope you have an amazing time today
full of smiles and joy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oooh... If only I had a granddaughter like you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The origami flowers are a huge hit with the fans.

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! A flower from Nishino Flower! I'm going
to frame this and put it on my wall!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you don't have to go that far!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But... thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Flower? The petals of this one look like they're
swirling...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's one that Tachyon created! Isn't it fun
to look at? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's handcrafted origami flowers
bring delight to all of her fans. Suddenly, a young
Umamusume comes up to us.

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan C
text_block_list.text: Um! Can I have a flower, please?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sure! Just a moment.

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan C
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ...U-um!

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan C
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to become an amazing, grown-up
Umamusume like you someday, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You think I'm amazing? ...And grown-up?

text_block_list.name: Flower Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! You're kind, and you look so cool when
you run! I wish I had a big sister like you to look
up to!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you so much. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day's festivities become an unforgettable
memory for not only the fans, but also for Nishino
Flower herself.
